headline.text: ML1 metal detector has rejected all test cards for *over 24 hours* — electric current present, maintenance inspection incomplete.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 had a string of minor equipment issues that cleared within shift: S2 jar labeler adjusted for wrinkles, S3 inclusion hopper stair screw tightened after coming loose, and Kettle A1 sensor required caramel drain for inspection. Plant standards work continues on S4 commissioning environmental clean.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 ML3 long belt warping caused repeated sensor hits and stoppages through second shift; maintenance fabricated a hold-down part and adjusted sensors by 07:41. ML2 PTL pump failed twice in 24 hours requiring full teardowns. FFS team short on peppermint flavor with only 4 shifts of supply remaining for York order.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 had the most significant downtime with a 3.5-hour stoppage for dosing head and block failures starting at 03:53; line restarted at 09:19 after piston replacement and full clean. ML4 startup found 102 damaged molds and multiple mold jams from chocolate buildup at demolding. Truffle Line cross conveyor will require teardown repair after today's production ends.
